meaning: adj.三焦距的n.三焦距透镜,三用镜片的眼镜
examples: It consist of computation of fundamental matrix in two views and of trifocal tensor in three views.
A lined trifocal design with three areas of focus: Distance (carrier), Intermediate and Near (reading addition).
Methods The internal trifocal distractor was used to reconstruct the mandibular segmental defects of 4 canine model.
